svg.text: The plan now: one clean causal result about how
docs/PLAN.md — the single canonical plan (planning sync 07-11 morning; statuses as of Saturday midday: K3 launched, v9 installer running, K1 on its persona gate); chips show what has already landed
Instrument & organism build (Colab lane, gates the Kaggle window)
Phase 1A — Qwen clean anchor grid: 4 judge conditions × 4 seeds × 4 rounds, +1 measure-only (Kaggle K1, ~12.5 h measured)
Phase 1B — OLMo conservative-judge inversion, repowered (Kaggle K2, ~20.5 h: 6 confirmatory + 3 control seeds)
The rest of the sprint — order K2 → K1 → K2 controls → K3 → K4; in practice K3 launched first (K1/K2 gate-blocked)
runs only if K1–K3 finish early.
